A signature four-hands healing approach weaving together therapeutic Thai acupressure, healing Qigong, Yin Yoga and Deep Resonance Sound Healing with Tibetan singing bowls.

What We Offer

Targeted Meridian Sound Therapy

Rooted in the principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine, our treatments work directly with meridian pathways and acupuncture points to address specific symptoms and conditions. Rather than offering a generalised wellness experience, every session is precisely tailored to your body, your symptoms and your goals.

Four-Hands Treatment

Every AcuSona session is delivered by both Jenny and Seb working together: two practitioners, four hands, one unified treatment. This allows us to work simultaneously on meridian pathways, combining acupressure and sound healing in real time for a depth of treatment that a single practitioner cannot achieve alone.

Sessions are available for individual clients and couples.

  • Nuad Kod Jud - therapeutic Thai acupressure targeting specific meridian pathways
  • Deep Resonance Sound Healing with Tibetan singing bowls placed on and around the body
  • Healing Qigong - guided energy cultivation for self-regulation and recovery
  • Yin Yoga - long-held postures working deep into connective tissue and meridian lines
  • Integrated four-hands treatment protocols drawing from all four disciplines
  • Sessions tailored to your specific complaints and conditions

Please note: Our treatments are offered as complementary therapy rooted mainly in the principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine. While they have been shown to be highly effective in addressing a wide range of symptoms and conditions, they are not a substitute for medical diagnosis or treatment. If you are currently under medical care, please continue to consult your healthcare provider.

Your Practitioners

Two Traditions, One Practice

AcuSona was born from a cross-cultural partnership, each practitioner bringing extensive experience in Eastern healing arts. What unites Jenny and Seb is a shared commitment to authentic, targeted therapeutic work - not trends, not wellness aesthetics, but deep practice rooted in tradition and informed by direct experience with the body's meridian system.

Together, they have developed a signature four-hands approach that combines the precision of therapeutic Thai acupressure with the transformative power of Tibetan singing bowl resonance, supported by Qigong and Yin Yoga as complementary pathways to healing.
